content.body:
hi all, quick question (from my boss). If I remember correctly Denjell  you mentioned that the work on this standard will continue in 2027. More specifically:

- what exactly will the work look like after we submit the standard ? (i believe submission deadline is 31.12.2026)
- is there a timeline (even approximated) that I can bring back to my boss? from now to the end of our work (in 2027)?

thank you!
